name: Rheumatoid Arthritis
summary: Rheumatoid arthritis is an autoimmune inflammatory joint disease with strong HLA associations and polygenic background. GENARCH provides educational summaries only.
adolescent_relevance: Can present in young adulthood; included for autoimmune mechanism education only.

genetic_architecture.prs_notes: PRS discussed as population-level genetic liability; GENARCH does not provide individual predictions.

exposure_modifiers.mechanism_hypothesis: Smoking is associated with RA in multiple studies; mechanisms may involve immune tolerance pathways.
Systemic inflammatory exposure context; evidence is mixed.
Inhaled particulates studied as autoimmune modifiers in some settings.

population_equity.gwas_ancestry_breakdown: RA GWAS include multiple ancestries but many analyses are European-weighted.
population_equity.transferability_notes: Effect sizes and PRS can vary across ancestries due to LD and allele frequency.

references.title: Meta-analysis of genome-wide association studies identifies risk loci for rheumatoid arthritis
Rheumatoid arthritis immunology and cytokine networks: overview (review)
The Health Consequences of Smoking—50 Years of Progress
references.journal: U.S. Department of Health and Human Services

references.title: Air pollution and health: evidence and mechanisms (review)
references.journal: Journal of the Air & Waste Management Association

references.title: Occupational exposures and chronic lung disease risk: overview (review)
